Title: n8n has XSS in its Credential Management Flow
Description: An authenticated user with permission to create and share credentials could craft a malicious OAuth2 credential containing a JavaScript URL in the Authorization URL field. If a victim opened the credential and interacted with the OAuth authorization button, the injected script would execute in their browser session.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 2.6.4, all versions starting from 2.7.0 before 2.8.0
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 2.6.4 before 2.7.0, all versions starting from 2.8.0
